slides.title: Hidden sugar may *age you faster* than you think.
slides.sub: It is not the obvious desserts. It is the added sugar tucked into everyday food.

slides.title: Where sugar hides
slides.body: Sauces, bread, yogurt and granola often carry *added sugar* you never notice. It adds up quietly.

slides.title: The slow, cumulative cost
slides.body: Years of excess sugar are linked to *faster metabolic aging*. The damage is gradual, not sudden.

slides.title: Make a few easy swaps
slides.body: Plain yogurt with fruit. Water instead of soda. Small trades *can cut a lot* over time.

slides.title: Read the label
slides.body: Check the added sugars line, not just the total. The hidden grams are *where it adds up*.

slides.title: Less, not none
slides.body: You do not need to quit sweetness. Just trim the hidden sugar that *quietly speeds aging*.

slides.title: Protect the years that *feel good*.
slides.body: Vibe Health scores your food, sleep and movement and turns the habits that protect your healthspan into one daily number.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
